hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
p = d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath','')
if 'skills/baby-monitor/scripts/' in p or 'skills/baby-monitor/references/' in p:
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'SYNC CHECK: You modified baby-monitor source code. Before committing, verify these are up to date: (1) README.md — architecture diagram, file paths, CLI examples, design decisions (2) skills/baby-monitor/SKILL.md — architecture, scripts table, directory structure, log format (3) skills/baby-report/SKILL.md — if detection methods or report metrics changed (4) skills/baby-monitor/dashboard/app.py — if JSONL schema or new fields were added'}}))
"
